issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.toggle()` function adds/removes CSS classes to open/close the mobile navigation drawer, but never sets or updates the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`.nav-toggle`). Screen‑reader users cannot know whether the menu is expanded.
issuesFound.fix:
In `mobileNav.open()` and `mobileNav.close()` add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` and `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` respectively (or toggle the attribute based on the new state).

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing aria‑controls reference
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button (`.nav-toggle`) controls the drawer element (`#nav-drawer`) but no `aria-controls` attribute is set linking the button to the drawer’s `id`. Assistive technologies cannot associate the control with its target.
issuesFound.fix:
After obtaining the drawer element, add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', _drawer.id)` (or generate an `id` for the drawer if missing).

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: In `dropdownMenu._onTriggerKeydown()` and `dropdownMenu._onTriggerClick()` the dropdown’s trigger button toggles the panel visibility, but the code never updates the `aria-expanded` state on the button.
issuesFound.fix:
When opening a dropdown call `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; when closing call `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger missing aria‑controls reference

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion items do not update aria‑expanded

issuesFound.fix:

issuesFound.title: Product filter count badge not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: After filtering, `productFilter._updateCountBadge()` updates the visible count but does not announce the new total to assistive technology. Users have no feedback that the result set changed.

After setting the badge text, call `liveRegion.announce(`${count} product${count===1?'':'s'} found`)` or update an off‑screen live region with the count.

issuesFound.title: Form fields validated with inlineValidator do not set aria‑invalid on error
issuesFound.explanation: The `inlineValidator.validate()` function marks fields with CSS classes but never adds `aria-invalid="true"` when validation fails, nor removes it on success. Screen readers cannot detect invalid fields.
issuesFound.fix:
In `inlineValidator._renderResult()` add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', result.valid ? 'false' : 'true')` when rendering the result.

issuesFound.title: Form validation errors are not reflected in aria‑invalid for newsletter and contact forms
issuesFound.explanation: Both forms use `inlineValidator` but the validation rules only add visual error messages; they never set `aria-invalid` on the inputs, violating ARIA requirement for error indication.
issuesFound.fix:
Ensure each field’s validation result calls `setAttr(input, 'aria-invalid', result.valid ? 'false' : 'true')` and removes the attribute when the field becomes valid.

After toggling, call `liveRegion.announce('View mode switched to ${mode} view')`.

---

issuesFound.title: Pricing period change does not announce the new billing period
issuesFound.explanation: Selecting a different billing period updates prices but does not announce the change to assistive technology. Users cannot know which period is active.
issuesFound.fix: After updating prices, add `liveRegion.announce('Billing period switched to ${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label}')`.

fpTitles: Dropdown menu trigger missing aria‑controls reference
Form validation errors are not reflected in aria‑invalid for newsletter and contact forms

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger does not update `aria‑expanded` when the drawer is opened/closed
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.open()` and `mobileNav.close()` functions add/remove CSS classes but never set or remove `aria-expanded` on the hamburger button (`_trigger`). Screen‑reader users cannot know the navigation state.
issuesFound.fix:
In `open()` set `_trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true')`; in `close()` set it to `'false'`.

---

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing `aria-controls` linking to the drawer
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button (`_trigger`) has no `aria-controls` attribute that references the drawer element’s id, so assistive technologies cannot associate the control with its controlled region.
issuesFound.fix:
Assign an id to the drawer (`_drawer.id = srUtils.ensureId(_drawer,'nav-drawer')`) and set `_trigger.setAttribute('aria-controls', _drawer.id)` during init.

---

issuesFound.title: Drawer element not hidden from accessibility tree when closed
issuesFound.explanation: When the drawer is closed, the code only removes CSS classes; it never adds `aria-hidden="true"` (or a `hidden` attribute) to the drawer, leaving it perceivable to AT even though it is visually hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
In `close()` add `_drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true')`; in `open()` remove that attribute.

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger does not update `aria‑expanded` on open/close
issuesFound.explanation: `_openInstance()` and `_closeInstance()` toggle visibility of the panel but never set `aria-expanded` on the trigger button, breaking the disclosure pattern.
issuesFound.fix:
In `_openInstance(inst)` call `inst.trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true')`; in `_closeInstance(inst)` set it to `'false'`.

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger missing `aria-controls` attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button is given `aria-haspopup` but no `aria-controls` that points to the associated panel, preventing AT from linking the control to its popup.
issuesFound.fix:
Ensure each trigger has an id and set `trigger.setAttribute('aria-controls', panel.id)` during registration.

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown panel not marked `aria‑hidden` when hidden
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown is closed the panel receives a `hidden` attribute but no `aria-hidden="true"`. AT may still expose the element.
issuesFound.fix:
In `_closeInstance()` add `panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true')`; in `_openInstance()` remove that attribute.

---

issuesFound.title: Billing‑period toggle buttons do not update `aria‑pressed`
issuesFound.explanation: The period buttons (`_periodBtns`) receive an `active` class but never set `aria-pressed` to reflect their selected state, violating the toggle button pattern.
issuesFound.fix:
In `_syncToggleState(period)` set `btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(btnPeriod===period))` for each button.

---

issuesFound.title: Billing‑period toggle container missing `aria‑controls` / `aria‑pressed`
issuesFound.explanation: The overall toggle (`_toggleEl`) is given `role="switch"` but never receives `aria-checked`/`aria-pressed` or `aria-controls` linking to the pricing table, so its state is not exposed.
issuesFound.fix:
Assign an id to the pricing table (`pricingTable.id = srUtils.ensureId(pricingTable,'pricing-table')`) and set `_toggleEl.setAttribute('aria-controls', pricingTable.id)`. Also update `aria-checked`/`aria-pressed` when the period changes.

---

issuesFound.title: Search input does not update `aria‑expanded` when suggestions list opens
issuesFound.explanation: The combobox (`_inputEl`) receives `aria-autocomplete="list"` and `aria-haspopup="listbox"` but never gets `aria-expanded="true"`/`"false"` when the suggestion panel is shown or hidden, breaking the ARIA combobox pattern.
issuesFound.fix:
In `_open()` set `_inputEl.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true')`; in `_close()` set it to `'false'`.

---

issuesFound.title: Product‑filter UI updates (result count, empty‑state) are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: After filters are applied, `_updateCountBadge` and `_updateEmptyState` modify the DOM but no live‑region announcement is made, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the new result count or empty‑state.
issuesFound.fix:
After updating the count, call `liveRegion.announce(`${count} product${count!==1?'s':''} found`)`. Likewise announce when the empty‑state appears.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period change is not announced to assistive technologies
issuesFound.explanation: `pricing.setPeriod()` updates UI and fires a custom event, but does not write a message to a live region, so users are not told that billing period switched (e.g., “Annual billing selected”).
issuesFound.fix:
After changing the period, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.pricingAnnualSelected || 'Annual billing selected')` (or the appropriate message).

issuesFound.title: Scroll‑to‑top button lacks an accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The button referenced by `SELECTORS.scrollTopBtn` is given no visible text or `aria-label`, making it impossible for screen‑reader users to discover its purpose.
issuesFound.fix:
Add `button.setAttribute('aria-label', STRINGS.scrollToTop || 'Scroll back to top')` and ensure the button contains discernible text or an accessible label.

issuesFound.title: Testimonials carousel navigation buttons lack `aria-label`/`aria-controls`
issuesFound.explanation: The carousel’s previous/next buttons are added via `document.createElement('button')` without an `aria-label` describing their function, violating button naming requirements.
issuesFound.fix:
Set `prevBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', STRINGS.carouselPrev || 'Previous testimonial')` and similarly for the next button.

issuesFound.title: Dynamic content updates in the multi‑step wizard are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: When the wizard advances to a new step, the UI updates (step indicator, focus) but no live‑region message is emitted, so screen‑reader users cannot track progress.
issuesFound.fix:
After `_goToStep()` call `liveRegion.announce(`Step ${target+1} of ${_steps.length}`)`.

issuesFound.fix: Line 289: body { min-height: 100%; font-family: var(--font-family-sans); font-size: var(--font-size-base); font-weight: var(--font-weight-normal); line-height: var(--line-height-normal); color: var(--colour-text-primary); background-color: var(--colour-bg-page); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; text-rendering: optimizeLegibility; overflow-x: hidden; position: relative; word-spacing: normal; letter-spacing: -0.05em; }

issuesFound.title: Insufficient colour contrast on footer[role="contentinfo"] nav a
issuesFound.explanation: Footer navigation links use color: var(--colour-neutral-400) (#94a3b8) against a background-color of var(--colour-neutral-900) (#555555), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 3.1:1, which fails the WCAG AA requirement of 4.5:1 for normal text.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1070: footer[role="contentinfo"] nav a { font-size: var(--font-size-sm); color: var(--colour-neutral-300); text-decoration: none; transition: color var(--transition-fast); line-height: var(--line-height-normal); display: inline-block; min-height: 24px; }

issuesFound.title: Insufficient colour contrast on .social-links a
issuesFound.explanation: Social media links use color: var(--colour-neutral-400) (#94a3b8) against the footer background of var(--colour-neutral-900) (#555555), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 3.1:1, failing WCAG AA requirements.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1078: .social-links a { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-2); font-size: var(--font-size-sm); color: var(--colour-neutral-300); text-decoration: none; transition: color var(--transition-fast); min-height: 28px; padding-block: var(--space-2); }

issuesFound.title: Insufficient colour contrast on .filter-tabs button[aria-pressed="true"]
issuesFound.explanation: Active filter tabs use color: var(--colour-brand-primary) (#5588bb) against a background-color of var(--colour-bg-page) (#ffffff) with a font-size of 14px (sm) and font-weight of 500. The contrast ratio is approximately 3.8:1, which fails the 4.5:1 requirement for normal text (14px is not large text).
issuesFound.fix: Line 798: .filter-tabs button[aria-pressed="true"] { background-color: var(--colour-bg-page); color: var(--colour-brand-primary-hover); font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); }

issuesFound.title: Link underline removed with no alternative on a
issuesFound.explanation: The global a selector removes text-decoration (underlines) from all links. While some specific link types provide alternatives (such as underline on hover or background changes), links in the account navigation and other areas rely solely on colour to distinguish them from surrounding text, failing WCAG 1.4.1 Use of Color.
issuesFound.fix: Line 318: a { text-decoration: underline; } or provide a non-colour visual differentiator such as border-bottom or font-weight for all link states.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu open and close functions show and hide the panel but do not synchronise the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button. This prevents screen readers from announcing the expanded/collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1259: Insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `inst.open = true;` in _openInstance.
  Line 1272: Insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `inst.open = false;` in _closeInstance.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu trigger missing initial aria-expanded state
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown triggers are not initialised with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads. The panel is hidden via setAttribute('hidden', '') but the trigger does not reflect this state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1333: Insert `setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `panel.setAttribute('hidden', '');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When an FAQ item is expanded, the function updates the open state and CSS classes but fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. The close function correctly sets it to false, creating an inconsistency.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2602: Insert `setAttr(item.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `item.open = true;`.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The search combobox input does not update aria-expanded when the suggestion list opens or closes. Since the input has role="combobox" and aria-controls, it must reflect the expanded state.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1582: Insert `setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` immediately after `_searchState.open = true;` in _open.
  Line 1592: Insert `setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `_searchState.open = false;` in _close.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch input missing initial aria-expanded state
issuesFound.explanation: The search input is configured as a combobox with aria-controls and aria-haspopup but is not initialised with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads and the suggestion list is hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1488: Insert `setAttr(input, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` immediately after `setAttr(input, 'aria-haspopup', 'listbox');`.

issuesFound.title: productFilter tab buttons missing aria-pressed update
issuesFound.explanation: The filter tab buttons act as toggle buttons (one active at a time) but do not update aria-pressed to indicate the active state. Only CSS classes are toggled.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1782: Replace `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);` with `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive); setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, String(isActive));`.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: When a form field is marked invalid, the function adds aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true". Screen readers cannot identify the field as having invalid input.
issuesFound.fix: Line 920: Insert `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');` immediately after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);`.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid missing aria-invalid reset
issuesFound.explanation: When a form field is cleared/validated, the function removes the error description but does not reset aria-invalid to "false" or remove the attribute. The field remains marked as invalid to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line 932: Insert `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'false');` or `removeAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID);` after the if block that handles aria-describedby.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing the mobile navigation drawer changes the visible content but does not announce the state change to screen readers via the live region. Users are not informed that the menu has opened or closed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1158: Insert `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened');` before the emit call in open.
  Line 1177: Insert `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');` before the emit call in close.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding and collapsing dropdown menus changes visible content but does not announce the state change. Users are not informed when a submenu opens or closes.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 1261: Insert `liveRegion.announce('Menu expanded');` after setting aria-expanded in _openInstance.
  Line 1276: Insert `liveRegion.announce('Menu collapsed');` after setting aria-expanded in _closeInstance.

issuesFound.title: pricing period change missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Switching between monthly and annual billing updates visible prices but does not announce the change to screen readers. Users are not informed that prices have been updated.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2000: Insert `liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.announce.pricingMonthly);` after updating the toggle state.

issuesFound.title: productFilter missing live region announcement for results
issuesFound.explanation: Applying filters updates the product grid and count badge but does not announce the result count to screen readers. Users are not informed how many products match the selected filters.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1715: Insert `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied ? STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(s.activeCategory) : \`Showing \${toShowEls.length} products\`);` after the emit call in applyFilters.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu triggers missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown menu trigger buttons do not update their aria-expanded attribute when the dropdown panel is shown or hidden, violating the disclosure pattern requirements.
issuesFound.fix: Line in dropdownMenu._openInstance(): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` after `inst.panel.removeAttribute('hidden');` and in dropdownMenu._closeInstance(): Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` at the start of the function before closing the panel.

issuesFound.title: Search combobox missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The search input acts as a combobox with an expandable suggestion listbox, but does not update aria-expanded to reflect the open/closed state of the suggestions.
issuesFound.fix: Line in siteSearch._open(): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'true');` after `_searchState.open = true;` and in siteSearch._close(): Add `setAttr(_inputEl, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` after `_searchState.open = false;`

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle buttons (monthly/quarterly/yearly) function as a toggle button group but do not set aria-pressed to indicate which button is currently active/pressed.
issuesFound.fix: Line in pricing._syncToggleState(): Add `setAttr(btn, ARIA.PRESSED, String(isActive));` inside the forEach loop after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`

issuesFound.title: Form validation errors not setting aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When form fields are marked invalid, the function updates aria-describedby to link the error message but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field, so screen readers don't announce the invalid state.
issuesFound.fix: Line in srUtils.markInvalid(): Add `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'true');` after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);`

issuesFound.title: Form validation valid state not clearing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When form fields are marked valid, the function removes the error from aria-describedby but does not set aria-invalid="false" or remove the aria-invalid attribute, leaving stale invalid state.
issuesFound.fix: Line in srUtils.markValid(): Add `setAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID, 'false');` or `removeAttr(field, ARIA.INVALID);` after updating the aria-describedby attribute.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button is not initialised with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads, even though the drawer is initially closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line in mobileNav.init(): Add `setAttr(_trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` after the event listeners are attached (or after _initialised = true).

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu triggers missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown trigger buttons are not initialised with aria-expanded="false" when registered, even though the panels are initially hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Line in dropdownMenu.register(): Add `setAttr(trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` after `panel.setAttribute('hidden', '');`

issuesFound.title: Search combobox missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The search input with role="combobox" is not initialised with aria-expanded="false" when the suggestion listbox is initially closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line in suggestionListRenderer.mount(): Add `setAttr(input, ARIA.EXPANDED, 'false');` after setting the other ARIA attributes.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period buttons missing initial aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle buttons are not initialised with aria-pressed attributes to indicate the default selected state.
issuesFound.fix: Line in pricing.init(): After calling setPeriod(initPeriod, false), add a call to update aria-pressed on the buttons, or modify _syncToggleState to set aria-pressed as in Issue 4.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation state change not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing the mobile navigation drawer is not announced to screen reader users via a live region.
issuesFound.fix: Line in mobileNav.open(): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened');` at the end of the function. Line in mobileNav.close(): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');` at the end of the function.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu state change not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing dropdown menus is not announced to screen reader users.
issuesFound.fix: Line in dropdownMenu._openInstance(): Add `liveRegion.announce('Dropdown opened');` after opening. Line in dropdownMenu._closeInstance(): Add `liveRegion.announce('Dropdown closed');` after closing.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion state change not announced
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding and collapsing FAQ items is not announced to screen reader users, making it difficult to know when content has changed.
issuesFound.fix: Line in faqAccordion.open(): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqOpened(item.question));` after setting aria-expanded. Line in faqAccordion.close(): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqClosed(item.question));` after setting aria-expanded.

issuesFound.title: Product filter results not announced
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied to the product grid, the result count is updated visually but not announced to screen reader users.
issuesFound.fix: Line in productFilter.applyFilters(): Add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied ? STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(_productFilterState.activeCategory) : \`Showing ${totalMatches} products\`);` after `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`

issuesFound.title: Pricing period change not announced
issuesFound.explanation: When users switch between monthly, quarterly, and annual billing periods, the price changes are not announced to screen reader users.
issuesFound.fix: Line in pricing.setPeriod(): Add `liveRegion.announce(period === 'month' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingMonthly : period === 'year' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual : 'Prices updated');` after updating the prices.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation drawer missing aria-hidden when closed
